name: Investment Strategies
prompts: What's the best strategy to invest in crypto?
Which cryptocurrencies should I consider for long-term growth?
Can you provide a list of top 10 potential coins to invest in based on market trends?

name: Marketing Prompts
prompts: How do I create compelling ad copy for my crypto product?
What's the most effective way to advertise our new NFT collection?
Can you suggest creative ideas for a limited-time crypto giveaway?

name: Customer Support Scenarios
prompts: How do I handle a customer who lost access to their cryptocurrency wallet?
What's the best response when someone asks about the security of our platform?
Can you provide a script for responding to a worried customer concerned about crypto market volatility?

name: Education & Onboarding
prompts: How do I explain the benefits of staking crypto to a beginner?
What's an easy-to-understand explanation of what decentralized finance is?
Can you provide a step-by-step guide on how to buy and sell cryptocurrencies for first-time buyers?

name: Developer Tools
prompts: How can I leverage blockchain technology in my crypto app?
What are the most popular open-source libraries for working with cryptocurrencies?
Can you provide code snippets to integrate our platform with major cryptocurrency exchanges?
